title: polypodium dimidiatum
intro: Polypodium dimidiatum, also known as the lesser polypody, is a species of fern native to Europe and North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The plant is used to promote overall health and well-being, with its extracts believed to have antioxidant, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, offering potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Polypodium dimidiatum is prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, often in combination with other herbs, to support respiratory health and soothe digestive issues.
